revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.
1 revision imported: importing redirects I created with chatGPT

revision.text: {{documentation subpage}} <includeonly>{{Sandbox other|| <!-- CATEGORIES AND INTERWIKIS HERE, THANKS --> [[als:Vorlage:SWE]] [[ar:قالب:SWE]] [[frp:Template:Suède]] [[az:Şablon:SWE]] [[bn:Template:SWE]] [[bar:Vorlage:SWE]] [[ca:Plantilla:SUE]] [[de:Vorlage:SWE]] [[el:Πρότυπο:SWE]] [[es:Plantilla:SWE]] [[eo:Ŝablono:SWE]] [[eu:Txantiloi:SWE]] [[fr:Modèle:Suède]] [[gl:Template:SWE]] [[ko:틀:SWE]] [[hy:Կաղապար:SWE]] [[hsb:Předłoha:SWE]] [[io:Template:SWE]] [[id:Templat:SWE]] [[ie:Template:SWE]] [[is:Snið:SWE]] [[it:Template:SWE]] [[ka:თარგი:SWE]] [[lv:Veidne:SWE]] [[lb:Template:SWE]] [[hu:Sablon:Svédország]] [[mn:Template:SWE]] [[nl:Sjabloon:SE]] [[ja:Template:SWE]] [[nap:Template:SWE]] [[nn:Mal:SWE]] [[oc:Modèl:Suècia]] [[pt:Predefinição:SWE]] [[ro:Format:SWE]] [[qu:Plantilla:SWE]] [[ru:Шаблон:SWE]] [[simple:Template:SWE]] [[sk:Šablóna:SWE]] [[sl:Predloga:SWE]] [[sr:Шаблон:SWE]] [[sv:Mall:SWE]] [[th:แม่แบบ:SWE]] [[vi:Tiêu bản:SWE]] [[uk:Шаблон:SWE]] [[vec:Template:SWE]] [[zh-yue:Template:SWE]] [[zh:Template:SWE]] }}</includeonly>

revision.comment: Text replacement - "[[simple:" to "[[Category:Pages with simple english wikipedia interwikis]]"

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
